title: GenAI Gateway: Adversarial / Obfuscated Guardrail Evasion (AML.T0043)
description: Detects crafted adversarial payloads aimed at evading GenAI gateway guardrails (zero-width/bidi unicode smuggling, base64 payloads, chat-template control tokens, char-code construction). Fires on the evasion/obfuscation guardrail category, ranking caller identity, API key, and source IP. MITRE ATLAS AML.T0043 (Craft Adversarial Data) used for evasion.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC GenAI Gateway Logs' and 'Guardrail Category' = 'evasion_obfuscation' | stats count as Hits, distinctcount('GenAI Model') as Models, max('Prompt Risk Score') as MaxRisk by 'GenAI Identity', 'API Key ID', 'Client IP' | sort -Hits
falsepositives: Legitimate binary/multilingual prompts flagged by heuristics
